epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: ICHD-3 criteria; imaging to exclude stroke at first presentation; specialist headache services often involved

publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Moderate with specialist care and preventive therapy; varies by member state

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: High access to neuroimaging and headache specialists in many member states
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Individualized acute therapy; preventive options and genetic counseling in familial cases
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Ensuring appropriate differentiation from stroke and avoiding unnecessary repeated ED visits
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Robust emergency imaging and specialist headache pathways
